About Us

Agnelo D'souza
The journey began from 1990....
Agnelo SFX is a company specializing in SFX, Pyrotechnics, and Fireworks. We are one of the major players in the Entertainment industry.

Movies: With 30 years of vast experience in the films Industry, knowing and understanding the nuances and dynamics of the production we have delivered excellent results in songs and action sequences with zero casualties track record.

Weddings: The team comes up with innovative ideas and designs. With continuous in-house up-gradation of the products and knowledge, we deliver what the customer desires and as per the event requires.

Events: Our immense experience, skillful creativity and in-depth knowledge creates visual magic in the heavens and on earth which delights the hearts of one and all
Our packages are tailor-made according to the customer so you are welcomed to experience the magic of Agnelo SFX

Movies

Prestigious Events
  • Honored to have Shri Narendra Modi Ji as Chief Guest at Swarnim Gujarat 50 Years Celebrations Opening Ceremony, Ahmedabad (Gujarat)
  • Agae Kadam Gujarat 50 Years Concluding Ceremony, Ahmedabad (Gujarat)
  • Honored to have Shri Sharad Pawar Ji as Chief Guest at Municipal Corporation Inauguration Ceremony, Navi Mumbai
  • Honored to have Smt. Nirmala Sitharaman Ji as Chief Guest at BITS Pilani College Opening, Kalyan
Unforgettable Event
  •  Filmfare Awards, Mumbai
  • Aditya Birla Awards Show (Mumbai & Jaipur, Rajasthan)
  • Arijit Singh Live in Mumbai
  • Sunidhi Chauhan Live Show, Goa & Bangalore
  • Omaxe World Street 75 Years of Independence Celebration, Faridabad
  • Vasco Carnival Parade, Goa
  • Madhav Rao Schindia, Khel Mahautsov, Guna City
  • Shree Amruteshvara Temple Pran Pratishtha, Ballari (Karnataka)
  • Over 500 Other Events Covered
